summary: Added 'ammonia' SMARTS feature [NX3H3] to expose NH3 as a separate signal (amine SMARTS [NX3;H2,H1] excludes H3). Hantzsch guard: nitrogen check now accepts (amine + ammonia) >= 1. Paal-Knorr Pyrrole bonus boost: now fires on amine or ammonia.
strict_non_regression_status: PASS — all 9 metrics >= 3g-1b baseline; 7 improved, 2 unchanged, 0 regressed
diagnostic_journey: 3g-2 regression (5 cov_r5 losses): 2x Hantzsch, 2x Larock, 1x PKP
3g-2a partial fix (dihydropyridine SMARTS + softening): metrics unchanged from 3g-2 — fixes didn't address actual blockers
3g-2b fix (drop hard alkyne/amine reqs on Larock/PKP): recovered 3 cases but Hantzsch_905/906 still lost top3/r3/r5
3g-2c diagnosis: ammonia 'N' has H3 but amine SMARTS [NX3;H2,H1] requires H1/H2 — NH3 invisible to amine feature
3g-2c fix: ammonia SMARTS [NX3H3] + Hantzsch/PKP accept amine|ammonia → Hantzsch_905/906 recovered
smoke_tests: smoke_3g_2c.py — 5 sections, 14 checks ALL PASS including end-to-end Hantzsch_905 reaction SMILES (mult=1.000, no penalty)
